name: Firma Oponiarska Debica S.A.
summary: Firma Oponiarska Debica S.A. manufactures and sells passenger, commercial, and truck tires under the Debica, Goodyear, Dunlop, Fulda, and Sava brands in Poland. It also offers curing membranes that are used to make tires for planes, motorcycles, farming vehicles, passenger cars, and trucks. The company sells its products through tire distributors, a franchising network, and tire service stations, as well as online stores. It also exports tires to Luxembourg, Germany, Turkey, the United States, Canada, and France. The company was formerly known as Stomil Debica Sp√É¬≥lka Akcyjna and changed its name to Firma Oponiarska Debica S.A. in November 1993. The company was founded in 1937 and is based in Debica, Poland. Firma Oponiarska Debica S.A. is a subsidiary of Goodyear S.A.
